title: ReplaceImageRequest
description: Replaces an existing image with a new image. Replacing an image removes some image effects from the existing image in order to mirror the behavior of the Docs editor.

imageObjectId.description: The ID of the existing image that will be replaced.

uri.description: The URI of the new image. The image is fetched once at insertion time and a copy is stored for display inside the document.

tabId.description: The tab that the image to be replaced is in.
